title: Samhita Tree of Life Natural Stone Mortar & Pestle Mortar Diameter- 3.75"x 2.75" Pestle-5" x 1.5"
description:
About this item
Natural Stone Mortar and Pestle with Tree of Life Symbol Set for Kitchen Decoration and Fully Handmade Species Grinder
The mortar bowl and pestle work together to grind ingredients quickly to help speed up food preparation with minimum effort.
easy to use kitchen tool that creates dishes like guacamole, pesto, seasonings, grinds and crushes spices, herbs, salt, coffee beans and even pills.
Practical kitchen tools, exquisite workmanship, convenient cleaning and long service life.
Mortar Size: 3.75"x 2.75" and Pestel Size: 5" x 1.5"
reviews_5s:
I am very happy this item. It is very durable, and has a great weight to it. It also has a beautiful design on it. Plus, the price is very reasonable.Well made heavy spice crusher. Love the design and the weight of it. I keep it by my stove because some spices like oregano need crushed to release the flavor. I used to use my hands but this gives a better crush for dried (in jar) spices like Rosemary. I recommend.I use this to grind herbs and spices and I don't want some cheap synthetic manufactured piece of junk, you know. I want to feel connected to the earth and my food and use some stoneware from the earth itself. This is heavy, durable, solid, real stone. It's THE REAL DEAL and connects you with your food making. Perfect 5 stars. Actually I give it 6 stars since we now live in an age of "star inflation".

Don't think about it. You find the right one here.I must admit I never write reviews, but this TOL mortar and pestle is just so unexpectedly amazing, I had to give it a promo. This set is not only incredibly stunning, but the actual Quality of both pieces is clearly visible. It is simply perfect, adding to the TOL aesthetic of our bedroom, as well as being a very brilliant inclusion for my altar. It reminds me of ancient Greek pottery, and I Love that! Very, very Awesome!!This works well and is comfortable to use. The pastel fits well in the bowl and it grinds easy. It's also very nice looking.This is such a great mortar and pestle. Solid stone piece and beautiful tree design.very nice lookingI bought this for a disabled chef I am friends with as he didn't have one. I ended up liking it more than the 2 I have and really wanted to keep it for myself. To say he was elated with his birthday gift would be an understatement.This is my first mortar and pestle so I don’t have the experience to compare it to others, but I can say I’m happy with it. Has a nice weight to it and the design on it is exactly as pictured. Works as I expected and I would recommend it.Love the weight of this, perfect for grinding down pills for my dog, easy to clean.
reviews_1s: We use a mortar & pestle to grind up our Saffron & other herbs. After 3 months of use (twice a week), the top edges of this mortar began to chip off. Unless you want to add bits of whatever substance this mortar is made of to your meal, you may want to view other options.I noticed black wearing off when rubbed with olive oil, then what looked like overspray near the top inside of the mortar. Using brake cleaner on the pestle, it was clearly painted. I like paint, but not in my food. Into the trash.I love the look of it but mine never came.Pestle is cracked and I am not wasting my time and money to send it back.After opening the bubble wrap I noticed debris in the bottom and cracks in mortar inside before I opened the plastic wrap. When I opened it to see how bad the cracks were it fell apart in my hand. The box it came in was undamaged and was packaged in a second box that was also undamaged.Praktisches kleines Ding, gehört in jeder Küche.Not sure what material this is made out of ..I have only used it to crush ginger and garlic... And this has the tendency to crumble as it's a very soft material like sand ... The tip of the pestle leaves sand residue due to crumblingArrived broken.This is very poor quality, not sure what it is made of but it is not good and appears to have fine cracks, I don’t think that it would last very long if used, it will be going back.Just there using it next minute I look down and there's black bits breaking off, long day should of got a wooden one
